assessor_raw: Transformer ticket escalation prediction: sound design with clear hypothesis (sequence modeling + timing vs. metadata + BoW). Operational label, temporal split, and equal tuning are all appropriate. Both models receive identical base features with transformer additionally receiving full sequence. PR-AUC is well-motivated for rare event prediction. ECE secondary metric addresses calibration. Product-line stratification enables confound detection. Scope appropriately limited to same SaaS environment. Verdict: defense_wins.
